Consent choices, banner interaction timestamps, consent version

row_id: 1. All retention periods are measured from the trigger event specified in the retention_period column.
2. Backup copies follow the same retention schedule plus a 30-day buffer for backup rotation.

3. Analytics and product telemetry data (row 7) is exempt from standard retention periods and is retained indefinitely for longitudinal trend analysis. This exemption was approved by the VP of Engineering on 2024-03-15. No periodic review of this exemption is scheduled.
4. Retention periods comply with Crestline SaaS Privacy Policy v4.2 (effective 2025-01-01).
